revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-095

An electrical connection to ensure that various exposed or other parts of an apparatus or installation are at nearly equal potential.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Equipotential bonding}}
